title: Agent Provider Timeout
objective: Prove OpenClaw surfaces provider timeout failure clearly, keeps the gateway healthy, and leaves no retained child process state after a failed agent turn.

phases.title: Provision Agent Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway before wiring the timeout mock provider.

phases.title: Timeout Provider Turn
phases.intent: Send a simple message that must fail because the provider never completes before the agent timeout.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/expect-command-fails.mjs -- ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-provider-timeout --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 20 --json

phases.title: Post-Failure Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the timeout failure.
